It will look at DPS that suit the card first, following The 太阳神之衡's priorities; if none found or they have buffs already, will look at the other DPS instead. 钢铁信念 try to skip party members that have damage downs or rez sickness. 钢铁信念 default to you if no suitable party members were found.

data.name: NIN_Simple_Mudras_Alt_Desc
data.value: Puts mudras on to a single button following basic logic and finishes them with 忍术. 天之印 = Hyosho 冰晶乱流之术 > 水遁之术 if trick cd less than 20s > 雷遁之术. 地之印 = 劫火灭却之术 > 风遁之术 if trick cd less than 20s > 火遁之术. 人之印 = 土遁之术

data.name: SMN_ST_Ruin3_Emerald_Ruin3_Desc
data.value: Replaces 绿宝石召唤 绿宝石毁灭 激荡 with 绿宝石毁灭 激荡 in the rotation when standing still and 绿宝石毁灭 环境探知 激荡 is not active (54-72). It is best, when using this, to set your 风神召唤 to call last during those levels or it will not do other summons until you spend all garuda charges. Intended Mainly for 70 Ultimates where it would matter. (Not worth it for average use)
